video_job.actor_prompt: Warm Japanese fantasy guild infirmary mood, an androgynous guild healer in cream and mint robes and a masculine scout in a cropped travel jacket with wind-tossed hair; the healer carefully supports the scout by the shoulder after a tiring quest drill, gentle two-person movement, clear hands and posture, soft lantern light, no text, no watermark.
video_job.target_continuation_prompt: Same continuous guild shot; after ten seconds the scout regains balance and nods while the healer keeps a steady supportive hold on his shoulder, soft lantern light, calm cooperative motion, consistent character appearances, no text, no watermark.
video_job.safety_notes: The interaction depicts a non-sexual, supportive physical gesture between two characters in a professional guild setting, adhering to safety guidelines.

timeline_story.selection_reason: Kaelen assists Toma in calming his restless familiar, which is causing a disturbance in the infirmary.

relationship_adjustments.reason: Collaborative effort to calm the familiar.
